_documentation: Per-machine overrides for hooks-config.json. Copy to hooks-config.local.json (gitignored) and customize.

_examples.fully_silent_machine: Set every disable*Hook key to true, or use SOUNDS_DISABLED=1 env var.
_examples.enable_verbose_logging: disableLogging: false (default) writes every hook event to hooks/logs/hooks-log.jsonl.
_examples.noisy_dev_box_quiet_hours: Override individual hooks while keeping the dispatcher loaded.
